mapped.target:
config firewall address
    edit "LAN"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "SRV"
        set subnet 192.168.1.10 255.255.255.255
    next
end

mapped.source: set service HTTPS protocol tcp port 443
mapped.target:
config firewall service custom
    edit "HTTPS"
        set tcp-portrange 443
    next
end

mapped.source: set service DNS protocol udp port 53
mapped.target:
config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS"
        set udp-portrange 53
    next
end

mapped.source:
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web from trust
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web to untrust
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web source LAN
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web destination any
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web application [ web-browsing ssl ]
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web service HTTPS
set rulebase security rules Allow-Web action allow
mapped.target:
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Allow-Web"
        set srcintf "trust"
        set dstintf "untrust"
        set srcaddr "LAN"
        set dstaddr "any"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set action accept
    next
end

preview_text:
# Anteprima conversione panos -> fortios — SentinelNet Config Converter
# 5 elementi mappati, 21 non mappati (vedi elenco 'unmapped').

config firewall address
    edit "LAN"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "SRV"
        set subnet 192.168.1.10 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall service custom
    edit "HTTPS"
        set tcp-portrange 443
    next
end

config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS"
        set udp-portrange 53
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "Allow-Web"
        set srcintf "trust"
        set dstintf "untrust"
        set srcaddr "LAN"
        set dstaddr "any"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set action accept
    next
end
unmapped: set address RANGE ip-range 10.0.0.1-10.0.0.50
set address SITE fqdn example.com
set deviceconfig system hostname PA-HQ
set address-group GRP static [ LAN SRV ]
set service-group WEBSVC members [ HTTPS DNS ]
set zone trust network layer3 [ ethernet1/2 ethernet1/3 ]
set zone untrust network layer3 ethernet1/1
set rulebase nat rules SNAT from trust
set rulebase nat rules SNAT to untrust
set rulebase nat rules SNAT source LAN
set rulebase nat rules SNAT destination any
set rulebase nat rules SNAT service any
set rulebase nat rules SNAT source-translation dynamic-ip-and-port translated-address ethernet1/1
set network ike gateway GW1 peer-address ip 198.51.100.1
set network ike gateway GW1 local-address interface ethernet1/1
set network tunnel ipsec TUN1 auto-key ike-gateway GW1
set network tunnel ipsec TUN1 tunnel-interface tunnel.1
set mgt-config users admin permissions role-based superuser yes
set mgt-config users viewer permissions role-based custom profile readonly
set shared authentication-profile AUTH1 method radius
set shared server-profile radius RAD1 server SRV1 address 10.0.0.10
